content:
New myself, but I think if you like/ want to use Corposant you also use Aurita (can buy her in shop every month) since both let you discard/ redraw. 

Corposant 4 cost lightning retribution gets cost reduced by 1 and redrawn instantly when discarded from hand. Probably put Tulu in too since her rouse gives tentacle damage/ strength when her cards are discarded or played and they also make tentacles attack when discarded

Fourth character idk, I really like Hameln so I'd probably keep him in team.

There's also a posse to discard hand to use.
Probably Clem and her wod she's great
